fields.body:
## Usage Guide

1. Author parent-only rules under `memory-viewers/.rule/rules/**`.
2. Preview the parent target with `rule explain-target --config rule-targets.yaml --target memory-viewers-readme`.
3. Generate the parent README with `rule sync-targets --config rule-targets.yaml`.
4. Keep child-repo summaries in the child workspaces so the parent target consumes them instead of duplicating them.
fields.title: Usage Guide

fields.body:
## Start Here

1. Need a visual workflow for work planning or review: open `ticket-viewer`.
2. Need to inspect specifications and code-reference structure: open `spec-viewer`.
3. Need automation, scripts, or agent-facing tools: move into `memory-api` and use the CLI, MCP, or HTTP surfaces there.
4. Need to regenerate repository docs: run `cargo run -p rule-cli -- sync-targets --config rule-targets.yaml` from the repo that owns the target.
5. Need the viewer-facing shared packages and controls: move into `viewer-api`.
fields.title: Usage Guide

fields.title: Usage Guide

fields.body:
## Dependency Graph

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    User((User)) --> TicketViewer[ticket-viewer]
    User --> SpecViewer[spec-viewer]
    TicketViewer --> TicketTools[memory-api ticket surfaces]
    SpecViewer --> SpecTools[memory-api spec surfaces]
    TicketTools --> ViewerAPI[viewer-api]
    SpecTools --> ViewerAPI
    Docs[generated README targets] --> MemoryTools[memory-api rule surfaces]
```
